title: Pkdaigle
compiled_truth: Pkdaigle is an external contact at [Neosoft](companies/neosoft). Over the corpus period (1999-12-09 to 2001-11-24), Pkdaigle sent 17 and received 23 emails, totalling 40 interactions. Top correspondents: [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (12), [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (5), [Patrick Johnson](people/patrick-johnson) (1), [Eva Rainer](people/eva-rainer) (1), [Lisa Druzbik](people/lisa-druzbik) (1).
